lastUpdates.message: fix: limit total toggle to footer and remove duplicate drop guides
feat: show timeline drop guidance inside travel chip
fix: reset duration minutes when duration hour changes
fix: relock edit mode after mobile place insert
fix: restore app render after mobile place selection flow
feat: add mobile place long-press selection and tap insert slots
fix: extend drag lock toast action and restore default buffer on unlock
fix: stabilize fixed-start buffer reconciliation across lock states
fix: recalculate base-place distance sorting from fresh address geocoding
fix: use main-plan adjacency for route chip source and destination lookup
fix: block duplicate library registration for lodge segments
feat: quick-set start time from compact business info segments
fix: sync buffer immediately when start time is fixed or edited
feat: show edit-mode toast when drag is attempted while locked
fix: align timeline formula to buffer-based start reconciliation
docs: define timeline time mechanism and buffer alignment rules
fix: show app version timestamp as absolute date and relative time
fix: remove fixed-time calculation-blocking conflict and rely on buffer alignment
fix: recompute buffer from fixed start time instead of zeroing it
fix: restore nav buffer chip for corrections over 30 minutes
feat: auto-apply buffer chip from remaining gap between schedules
fix: prevent warning-fix from forcing buffer chip to 0 coordinated
fix: stabilize business-warning auto adjust and buffer correction
fix: apply business warning auto-adjust delta into travel buffer
fix: recognize lodge segment addresses via source-lodge fallback
fix: rollback travel chip step buttons and restore 1min controls
모바일 시간휠 안정화: 드래그 중 snap/transition/live 반영 완화
모바일 시간휠 떨림 완화(드래그 중 자동정렬 차단) 및 3초 무입력 자동닫힘 추가
시간휠 드래그 감도 기본값(1:1)으로 복원
시간휠 드래그 민감도 완화: 저속 구간 1:1, 가속 상한 축소
